rows.label: qev041902_MSG0001
rows.name:
Why is the young lady with such a poor man!
Gaaahhhh! It is so frustrating, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Hnnh? Do you have business with the moneylender Jalolo, mo?
Interest starts at 50 percent for 10 days.
But right now my irritation is at max, so it is 80 percent, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0003
rows.name: Huh? Why should Jalolo have to lend money for a present for the young lady Popo, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Hnnh? Do you have business with the moneylender Jalolo, mo?
I wouldn't mind lending to you, but... interest starts at 100 percent for 10 days, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_JNK0010
rows.name: Persuade

rows.label: qev041902_SEL0011
rows.name: Convince Jalolo to lend money to Nio.

rows.label: qev041902_JNK0020
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev041902_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Jalolo why he is angry.

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0005
rows.name:
It is true that lending money is Jalolo's job, mo.
But I have no money to lend to a worm like this, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0006
rows.name: What benefit is there for Jalolo in lending money to a guy like this, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0007
rows.name:
I cannot... tell you that, mo!
But that worm standing right there is the cause, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0008
rows.name: There is absolutely no way I will lend him money...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0009
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0010
rows.name: ...Wait. If things go well, I might be able to utterly ruin this worm... mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0011
rows.name:
Alright... I changed my mind, mo.
Since it cannot be helped, I will lend you the money, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0012
rows.name:
Really, mo!?
Then let's sign the contract immediately, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0013
rows.name: However! If you cannot return the money by the date Jalolo specifies, I will take all the filthy hair attached to your head, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0014
rows.name:
Wha! What are you saying, mo!
This hair is the pride of a Nopon, mo!
I cannot afford to lose it, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0015
rows.name:
Then I cannot lend you the money, mo.
You can just fail at getting married without even being able to give the young lady a single present, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0016
rows.name:
Ugh... As long as Ntoto arrives, I can pay it back, mo.
Understood, mo. Let's make the contract immediately...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_JNK0030
rows.name: Stop

rows.label: qev041902_SEL0031
rows.name: Stop Nio from entering into such a dangerous contract.

rows.label: qev041902_JNK0040
rows.name: Permit

rows.label: qev041902_SEL0041
rows.name: Leave it to Nio's will and let him make the contract.

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0017
rows.name:
It is alright, mo.
With the money I have saved up so far, I can easily pay this much back, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0018
rows.name:
Well then, I will take the IOU, mo.
If you cannot return the money by the due date... I will pluck out this hair you are so proud of, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0019
rows.name:
Yes, yes, thank you for your business, mo.
Now then, worm, take the money, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0020
rows.name:
Alright, mo!
With this, I can buy the absolute best wedding dress for Popo, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: NewText_42
rows.name: I am going before it sells out, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0021
rows.name:
...Huh?
Was Nio not here just now, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0022
rows.name:
Popo is his fiancée...
There is an urgent matter, and I have been searching for him, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_JNK0050
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev041902_SEL0051
rows.name: Tell Popo everything.

rows.label: qev041902_JNK0060
rows.name: Evade

rows.label: qev041902_SEL0061
rows.name: Tell her, but keep the fact that he went to buy a dress a secret.

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0023
rows.name:
What!!
He borrowed money from Jalolo and went to buy a wedding dress... !?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0024
rows.name: That idiot... At the worst possible time, he borrowed money from the worst possible guy and left, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0025
rows.name: Why would he borrow money from Jalolo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0026
rows.name: I do not know the reason, but he must have borrowed it thinking he could pay it back with the money Ntoto is bringing, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041902_MSG0027
rows.name:
Young lady, you better hurry, mo!
You have to... stop him, mo![ST:wait ]
